title: basicly agent source
description: A subagent authored as agent.yaml, composed from slot blocks and projected to .claude/agents/<slug>.md.

schema_version.description: Source-format version; bump only when the loader contract changes.

name.description: Agent identifier (lowercase kebab-case); must match the containing directory name.

purpose.description: What the agent does; first sentence of the composed description.

triggers.description: When to delegate to it ('Use proactively when/after ...'); drives automatic delegation.

returns.description: What the agent hands back, so the parent can delegate without reading output dumps.

posture.description: Permission posture ('Read-only.'); linted for coherence against the tools list.

tools.description: Explicit tool allowlist; agents never silently inherit every tool.

model.description: Model alias, full ID, or 'inherit' (the default).

claude.description: Claude-only frontmatter passthrough (memory, maxTurns, ...); other readers ignore these keys.

override.description: Required true when an overlay agent replaces a core agent of the same slug.

technologies.description: Technology scoping tags (controlled vocabulary, enforced by catalog-lint); absent means universal.
